events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: caliper guide pins dry/seized on brakes, rough-complete stage. This is a defect - guide pins must be lubricated and free-moving per OEM specs. Dry/seized pins are non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision should be fail. Risk is high/critical since brakes are safety-critical.
